2605.18654.title: Pocket Foundation Models: Distilling TFMs into CPU-Ready Gradient-Boosted Trees
2605.18654.paper_summary: A fraud scorer needs to answer in under 2 ms. The best tabular foundation models (TFMs) take 151-1,275 ms on GPU. We close this gap by distilling the TFM offline into an XGBoost or CatBoost student that runs natively on CPU. The central obstacle is specific to in-context learning (ICL) teachers: they leak labels when scoring their own training set, so the soft targets collapse to near-one-hot vectors with no inter-class structure left to distill. Stratified out-of-fold (OOF) teacher labeling prevents this. Across 153 classification datasets drawn from TALENT, OpenML-CC18, TabZilla, and TabArena, distilling TabICLv2 into XGBoost gives 0.882 macro-mean AUC (96.5% of teacher AUC) at 1.9 ms on CPU, a 38x to 860x speedup across teacher-student pairs with a statistically significant edge over a tuned CatBoost baseline (Wilcoxon p = 0.0008; 51% win rate). Four further findings: teacher rank transfers exactly to student rank; gains concentrate on low-dimensional data (< 21 features: +0.011 over CatBoost vs. >21 features: +0.001); multi-teacher averaging helps MLP students (+0.006, p = 0.003) but adds less than 0.001 for tree students; and on high-dimensional tasks where the teacher itself trails CatBoost, distillation makes things worse rather than better. The full pipeline is open-sourced as part of the TabTune library.
2605.18654.paper_summary_zh: 一個詐騙評分器需要在 2 毫秒內回答。最好的表格基礎模型 (TFMs) 在 GPU 上需要 151-1,275 毫秒。我們通過將 TFM 離線蒸餾成一個原生在 CPU 上運行的 XGBoost 或 CatBoost 學生來縮小這個差距。中央障礙特別針對上下文學習 (ICL) 教師：當他們對自己的訓練集進行評分時會洩漏標籤，因此軟目標崩潰為接近一熱向量，沒有剩下的類間結構可供蒸餾。分層的折外 (OOF) 教師標記可以防止這種情況。在從 TALENT、OpenML-CC18、TabZilla 和 TabArena 中提取的 153 個分類數據集上，將 TabICLv2 蒸餾成 XGBoost 在 CPU 上以 1.9 毫秒的速度獲得 0.882 的宏平均 AUC（教師 AUC 的 96.5%），在教師-學生對之間實現了 38 倍到 860 倍的加速，並且在統計上顯著優於調整過的 CatBoost 基準（Wilcoxon p = 0.0008；51% 勝率）。四個進一步的發現：教師排名精確轉移到學生排名；增益集中在低維數據（< 21 特徵：相對於 CatBoost 增加 +0.011，而 >21 特徵：增加 +0.001）；多教師平均對 MLP 學生有幫助（+0.006，p = 0.003），但對樹狀學生的增益不到 0.001；在教師本身落後於 CatBoost 的高維任務中，蒸餾使情況變得更糟而不是更好。完整的流程作為 TabTune 庫的一部分開源。
2605.18654.author: Aditya Tanna et.al.
2605.18654.authors: Aditya Tanna, Nassim Bouarour, Mohamed Bouadi, Vinay kumar Sankarapu, Pratinav Seth
